pages.text: The first step in alchemy is obtaining a $(item)Transmutation Crystal$(), the starting material of this art. With it, you can craft a Transmutation Crucible and begin revealing the essence hidden within matter.

pages.title: Ars Transmutatoria
pages.text: Guided by the wisdom of the Emerald Tablet, perceive the hidden essences of all matter.

pages.name: Crystal Apparatus
pages.text: Place a cauldron on an emerald block and fill it with water. The two blocks are not consumed.

pages.title: The Three Reagents
pages.text: Throw one redstone dust, one gunpowder, and one glowstone dust into the full cauldron. When all three touch the water, they transform into a crystal.

pages.title: The First Matter
pages.text: The emerald block and cauldron remain intact, so one apparatus can produce crystals repeatedly. Prepare several: decomposition and many recipes depend upon them.
